page_title: Evangelion: 1.0 You Are (Not) Alone - ENTRY FILE 1
text:
is a guidebook for the film Evangelion: 1.0 You Are (Not) Alone by Newtype Editorial Department. It was published by Kadokawa Shoten on 31 October 2007. https://www.amazon.co.jp/dp/4048541196 

Overview

A thorough guide up to the climax of "Operation Yashima". It Includes interviews with 20 voice actors and creators. Includes gorgeous illustrations by Kazuya Tsurumaki, Shunji Suzuki, Hidenori Matsubara, Takeshi Honda and Jun Okuda. https://www.evangelion.co.jp/1_0/news/det_10613.html
